title: verbascum calycosum
intro: Verbascum calycosum, also known as the yellow mullein, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Verbascum genus and is native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia and the Mediterranean. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where its leaves and flowers are used to treat various health issues due to their anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Verbascum calycosum include its use as an expectorant to relieve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its application as a wound healer to treat skin irritations and burns. The plant's medicinal properties can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used in poultices and salves to apply topical relief.
